turn_info.content: I am a single mother, and I dont recieve any support from my childs father. I am struggling mentaly because I have no one to talk to. I have lost all of my friends since becoming a mom.

results.term: Thank you, but I feel like everyone says that.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you, but I feel like everyone says that.

results.term: I think the main reason ive lost my friends is bec...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I think the main reason ive lost my friends is because I cant go out with them or hangout anymore because I have a baby. Im not fun anymore. I had my child young so I feel like I lost out on my youth

results.term: Yes, thats right. But Im having trouble accepting ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, thats right. But Im having trouble accepting the fact that I have to do this alone.

results.term: Can I ask, as a single mother yourself, what was s...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Can I ask, as a single mother yourself, what was something that got you through those hard times? And was it hard financially?

results.term: My child's father has six other children and said ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My child's father has six other children and said hes at the max on child support. I guess I wont be getting anything from him. But Ive been making it work, its definitely been hard, but Im getting some money saved to give my daughter a better life.

results.term: Thank you so much for talking with me today
